{{Infobox character
| name = Seisha
| aliases = Wei Shi Seisha
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Wei Shi Seisha
| abilities = Path of the White Fox, launcher constructs
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Seisha Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Wei Shi Seisha is a respected member of the [[Wei clan]] and the mother of [[Lindon]]. She serves a vital role within her family, possessing skills as a [[Soulsmith]] and working with dream arts. Her expertise includes designing displays for festivals and utilizing various constructs, such as a [[drudge]] shaped like a segmented brown fish that assists her in tracking [[Remnants]] and recording observations. Seisha is known for being observant and studious, often using brushes, ink, and notebooks to document her findings. Throughout various challenges facing her family and clan, she has demonstrated a protective nature toward her son and remains deeply involved in the clan's affairs, even when facing significant hardships or displacement.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei Shi Seisha is the mother of [[Lindon]], characterized by her long brown hair and light brown eyes that stand out from those in her clan. While overseeing the [[arena]] staff during its construction, she utilizes a [[drudge]] to absorb items like chalk and records notes using a brush, ink, and scroll. Having reached the [[Iron stage]] by her twenty-second year, she travels accompanied by a guard and advises [[Lindon]] to remain observant and continue learning. During the presence of the [[Li clan]], she experiences a cold sweat while positioned near the [[Grand Patriarch]] as he settles upon the forest floor.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei Shi [[Seisha]] is [[Lindon's mother]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1">''Unsouled'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] is [[Lindon's mother]] and has long brown hair.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] uses a [[drudge]] that can absorb items like chalk.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] takes notes on a scroll using a brush and ink jar.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] is the mother of [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8">''Unsouled'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] has brown eyes that are lighter than anyone else's in the clan.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] is Wei Shi [[Seisha]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] is in charge of the [[arena]] staff while it is under construction.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] tells [[Lindon]] to keep his eyes open and learn.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei Shi [[Seisha]] reached the [[Iron stage]] in her twenty-second year.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] is accompanied by a guard.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] is in a cold sweat due to the [[Li clan]]'s presence.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Seisha]] is near the [[Grand Patriarch of the Li clan]] when he settles on the forest floor.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Wei Shi [[Seisha]] is a [[Soulsmith]] who is believed to be alive.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Wei Shi [[Seisha]] is a [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Wei Shi [[Seisha]] has a [[drudge]] that is a brown segmented fish made of [[dead matter]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Seisha]] is adjusting settings on her [[drudge]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Seisha]] sketches.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Seisha]] is studying the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Seisha]] uses a [[drudge]] with sensors.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Seisha]] observed a technique that was controlled directly by one person.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Seisha]] is the wife of [[Wei Shi Jaran]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Seisha]] insisted that they follow [[Lindon]]'s instructions.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Seisha]] uses launcher constructs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Seisha]] carries scripted packages.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Seisha]] is [[Lindon's mother]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Wei Shi Seisha, I suggest you take your son to the next testing. Perhaps the heavens will choose to have mercy on him then.” Seisha, Lindon’s mother, draws him to her waist protectively.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Seisha pushed him aside, drudge still floating over her shoulder. “Keep your eyes open. Learn what you can. However it turns out today, it's not the end of your path.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"She had the same drudge floating over her shoulder: a brown segmented fish made of dead matter that reminded Lindon of petrified wood."<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
